state.menuStyle: min-width: max-content; border-radius: calc(var(--layer-corner-radius) * 1px); z-index: 9999; width: unset; height: unset; grid-area: nav-menu; max-height: calc(100dvh - var(--mobile-header-height) - var(--mobile-nav-menu-offset)); margin-top: var(--mobile-nav-menu-offset); overflow-y: auto;
